name: @sevoniva/llm-coding-bridge
description: Local bridge for using OpenAI-compatible chat completion providers with coding clients.

scripts.lint: node --check bin/llm-coding-bridge.js && node --check lib/*.js && node --check lib/converters/*.js && node --check test/*.js && node --check scripts/*.js
scripts.test: node test/bridge-error.test.js && node test/chat-compat.test.js && node test/client-setup.test.js && node test/request-state.test.js && node test/security-files.test.js && node test/request-log.test.js && node test/security-http.test.js && node test/streaming-keepalive.test.js && node test/repo-gate.test.js && node test/smoke.js
